description_long: This object is a handheld gaming console, specifically resembling the Sony PlayStation Vita. It features a large central display flanked by two sets of controls on either side, including analog sticks, directional buttons, and action buttons. The body is primarily black with silver or gray accents along the edges, giving it a sleek and modern appearance. The front face includes a prominent screen, while the top and bottom edges show various ports and buttons for connectivity and power. The device is compact and ergonomically shaped for comfortable handheld use. Branding and button labels are visible, indicating its function as a portable entertainment device.
description: A sleek, black and silver handheld gaming console with a central display and dual control pads, designed for portable entertainment.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large display screen and both sets of control buttons clearly.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the left analog stick, directional pad, and part of the top edge.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the top edge with additional buttons and ports, and the back of the device.
description_view_3: Angled view focusing on the right analog stick, action buttons, and part of the top edge.
